params.name: Wheel of Fortune
params.description:
On Feb 25, 5000 BC, the Wheel of Fortune stopped spinning.
Clotho, the youngest of The Fates, was weaving the thread of human life when the spindle suddenly began to rotate by itself. The second sister, Lachesis, trembled as she saw that the thread was starting to break. Atropos, in charge of death, had lost control of the spinning wheel; at last, the Ragnarok is nigh. [The Fates] Third Sister: Clotho is in charge of birth and weaving the thread of life. Second sister: Lachesis is responsible …
